always_do: Execute AGENTS.md Section 0 (knowledge synchronization) as the first atomic operation
Perform exactly 10 recursive iterations of the deconstruct-plan-execute loop
Update repository memories in memcord progressively and immediately upon detecting drift
Verify current date and time via research-lookup before generating any temporal reports
Emit a structured RiskFrame and WorkflowEvent at the completion of each pipeline phase
Map SurrealDB usage against full multi-model capabilities (Graph, Vector, Time-series)
Strictly follow 'Fail to plan, plan to fail' (PSF-ITER-01) planning rigor
never_do: Initiate code implementation or remediation (Analysis and Planning scope only)
Save any artifacts or reports in the deprecated .jules/ directory
Issue architectural verdicts without anchored evidence from codebase or documentation
Modify tasklist.md or task files without a preceding 'read_file' operation
Introduce breaking changes to existing documentation structure without major version justification

pipeline.description: CFA-aligned 4-stage Problem Solving Framework (PSF) execution cycle with iterative refinement.

phases.name: Context & Memory Deconstruction
steps: Execute AGENTS.md Section 0 protocol (kb_sync, tree_gen, task_read)
Synchronize and re-read all active memcord entries for current repository
Compare codebase state against documentation to identify initial scope drift
Initialize iterative cycle counter (N=10)

phases.name: Strategic Audit Formulation
steps: Formulate deep audit plan covering functional, UI/UX, and database domains
Design test suite execution strategy for root-cause failure analysis
Define brainstorm parameters for long-term project vision (UX/UI, Backend, Features)
Plan the incremental update of docs/tasklist.md and docs/tasks/

phases.name: Audit Execution & Brainstorming
steps: Audit mocks, stubs, and implementation-ready code comments
Execute test suite and diagnose root causes (No fixes applied)
Analyze SurrealDB structure and backend connectivity/utilization
Identify code redundancy, documentation gaps, and architectural inconsistencies
Execute iterative Brainstorm loop: Visionary UX/UI, Feature expansion, Cross-project integration

phases.name: Planning Evaluation & Roadmap Reflection
steps: Update macrotasks in docs/tasklist.md using canonical templates
Generate detailed task files in docs/tasks/ for all discovered needs
Decompose complex findings into actionable, INVEST-compliant subtasks
Apply context-rot mitigation (hierarchical_summary_cycle) between refinement cycles
Repeat Iteration loop (Count < 10 ? GOTO PHASE-1 : NEXT)

phases.name: Final Validation & Submission
steps: Perform final self-revision of planning artifacts for CFA alignment
Conduct code review of all task/documentation changes
Execute commit and push operations directed to 'staging' branch
